name: Alibaba Cloud Observability MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Alibaba Cloud Observability MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Alibaba Cloud's observability services — querying SLS (Simple Log Service) logs, accessing ARMS (Application Real-Time Monitoring Service) metrics and traces, analyzing application performance data, and integrating Alibaba Cloud's monitoring platform into agent-driven DevOps and incident response workflows.
use_cases: Querying Alibaba Cloud SLS logs from incident investigation agents
Monitoring application performance with ARMS from DevOps agents
Analyzing distributed trace data from microservices debugging agents
Setting up log alerts and dashboards from operations automation agents
Correlating metrics, logs, and traces from observability agents
Investigating Alibaba Cloud infrastructure incidents from SRE agents
not_for: Non-Alibaba Cloud infrastructure (AWS CloudWatch, GCP, Azure Monitor require different MCPs)
Teams outside China or not using Alibaba Cloud
best_when: A DevOps or SRE team running infrastructure on Alibaba Cloud needs AI-assisted log analysis, metric monitoring, and incident investigation using native Alibaba Cloud observability services.
avoid_when: You run on AWS, GCP, or other cloud providers — or don't use Alibaba Cloud.

auth.notes: Alibaba Cloud AccessKey ID and AccessKey Secret required. RAM (Resource Access Management) fine-grained permissions supported. Use RAM role with minimum required permissions — SLS read, ARMS read for monitoring-only agents.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Alibaba Cloud free tier varies by service; SLS has free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: SLS: pay-per-use; ARMS: varies by monitored resources
pricing.notes: Alibaba Cloud services are pay-as-you-go. Free tier available for new accounts. Official MCP from aliyun.

performance.rate_limits: Alibaba Cloud API: rate limits vary by service and region

known_agent_gotchas: AccessKey credentials have broad scope — use RAM sub-account with minimal permissions
SLS log queries use a custom query language (SLS Query) — different from SQL
Region must be specified — Alibaba Cloud has many global regions
Primary audience is teams using Alibaba Cloud in China or Asia-Pacific
Official aliyun MCP — reflects Alibaba Cloud's AI integration investment
Data residency may be in China for China-region deployments
agent_readiness.security_notes: AccessKey auth. HTTPS enforced. RAM for fine-grained permissions. ISO27001/SOC2. Official aliyun MCP. Use minimal RAM permissions. Data residency varies by region.

security_score_components.security_notes: AccessKey with RAM. HTTPS. ISO27001/SOC2. Official aliyun. Minimal permissions. Data residency awareness.
